prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约29679→80866（2022年断档异常）→70457→60890→56996，2022年出现明显断档后位次持续前移，近3年累计前移约13470名，2025年 基准约56996名；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为62人，2024年增至66人，2025年67人；2026年计划65人，较2025年缩招2人（-3%），竞争略有减弱。211、双一流；软科主榜约第120名（2026年），近年排名稳定在116–122之间。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 该校未出现在近年声誉事件列表中，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度 总排名第95、评价「一般」，短视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度平稳；未见投档断档记录；食品科学与工程为A-学科，是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的 食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐；食品科学与工 程类热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生约31.3万人（较2025年32.1万略降约2.4%），竞争压力略有缓解；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔 滨市，在安徽省招生占比约1.5%（2025年84人/全国5575人），属跨省招生，地域距离较远对安徽考生报考意愿有一定抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年物理类计划小幅缩招（-3%）使竞争略减、本省物理类考生总数略降，以及学校声誉平稳、抖音关注度一般等因素，在2025年基准56996名基础上预计位次继续前移；预测最低位 次约55175名，区间54675–55675名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 29679 → 80866 (abnormal gap in 2022) → 70457 → 60890 → 56996. After a significant gap in 2022, the ranking has been moving forward, with a cumulative forward movement of about 13470 places in the last 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is about 56996. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 62 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 66 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 65, a reduction of 2 (-3%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking about 120th (2026), with stable rankings between 116-122 in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university has not appeared in recent reputation incident lists, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 95th overall, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is relatively low, indicating stable application attention. No records of enrollment gaps. Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, etc., are highly recommended hot majors. Food Science and Engineering has average popularity. In 2026, the province has about 313,000 Physics Category candidates (slightly down about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with an enrollment share in Anhui of about 1.5% (84 in 2025 out of 5575 nationwide), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The geographical distance somewhat inhibits Anhui candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in Physics Category enrollment plan for 2026 (-3%) slightly reducing competition, the slight decrease in total provincial Physics Category candidates, and the stable school reputation with average Douyin attention, the ranking is expected to continue moving forward based on the 2025 baseline of 56996. The predicted minimum ranking is about 55175, with a range of 54675-55675.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation

- Statistics
- Applied Chemistry
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Grain Engineering, Dairy Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Animal Production (including Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Plant Production (including Agronomy, Seed Science and Engineering)
- Radio and Television Directing
- Food Science and Engineering (Sino-US 121 Dual Degree Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 54675-55675, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 54600), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 55600), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.
